title: phyteuma orbiculare subsp. anglicum
intro: Phyteuma orbiculare subsp. anglicum, also known as English scabious, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the bellflower family. The medicinal properties of Phyteuma orbiculare subsp. anglicum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and supporting the immune system, as well as acting as a natural antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Phyteuma orbiculare subsp. anglicum, such as infusions and tinctures, are often used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
